query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
       COUNT(DISTINCT username) as unique_users,
       COUNT(DISTINCT value) as unique_speeds
FROM radreply 
WHERE attribute = 'Mikrotik-Rate-Limit'
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 38MgGCfAkTTcdrf.ae1ad98e5b22 --database JYruXSQahvP3cr6rPdjNhA --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total,
